description:
Welcome!

This is the official YouTube channel for Pastor Poju Oyemade.

Pastor ‘Poju Oyemade is the Senior Pastor at The Covenant Nation. He is a teacher, pastor, and leader who teaches practical insights into the application of the Word of Faith in everyday living. 

Pastor Poju teaches Christians, how they can practically apply God’s word to business, relationships, careers, etc so that they can fully manifest all God has ordained, purposed, and assigned them to on the earth.

To download this message and more please visit The Covenant Nation E-library via http://elibrary.insightsforliving.org/ 

To make sure you never miss another update, click the subscribe button and tap the notification bell.

𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐲 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝:
𝐏𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐨𝐣𝐮 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦: http://www.instagram.com/pastorpoju​​​ 
𝐏𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐨𝐣𝐮 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐛𝐨𝐨𝐤: http://www.facebook.com/pastorpoju​​​ 
𝐏𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐨𝐣𝐮 𝐓𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫: http://www.twitter.com/pastorpoju​​​
